candidate_definitions.text: FCOS: Fully Convolutional One-Stage Object Detection (ICCV'19)
This project hosts the code for implementing the FCOS algorithm for object detection, as presented in our paper:

Official PyTorch implementation of "Camera Distance-aware Top-down Approach for 3D Multi-person Pose Estimation from a Single RGB Image", ICCV 2019

Implementation of ICCV19 Paper "Learning Two-View Correspondences and Geometry Using Order-Aware Network"

Pytorch implementation of OANet for ICCV'19 paper ["Learning Two-View Correspondences and Geometry Using Order-Aware Network"](https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.04964), by Jiahui Zhang, Dawei Sun, Zixin Luo, Anbang Yao, Lei Zhou, Tianwei Shen, Yurong Chen, Long Quan and Hongen Liao.
Fully Convolutional HarDNet for Segmentation in Pytorch
- Added a new v2_transform() method to replace torch.cat + nn.Conv2d combinations with [CatConv2d](https://github.com/PingoLH/CatConv2d), an all-in-1 fused cuda kernel combining Concat and Conv2d.
35% faster than ResNet: Harmonic DenseNet, A low memory traffic network
* Fully utilize your cuda cores!
This repository contains the code for the paper "PIFu: Pixel-Aligned Implicit Function for High-Resolution Clothed Human Digitization"

candidate_glosses.text: This project hosts the code for implementing the FCOS algorithm for object detection, as presented in our paper:

Pytorch implementation of OANet for ICCV'19 paper ["Learning Two-View Correspondences and Geometry Using Order-Aware Network"](https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.04964), by Jiahui Zhang, Dawei Sun, Zixin Luo, Anbang Yao, Lei Zhou, Tianwei Shen, Yurong Chen, Long Quan and Hongen Liao.
- Added a new v2_transform() method to replace torch.cat + nn.Conv2d combinations with [CatConv2d](https://github.com/PingoLH/CatConv2d), an all-in-1 fused cuda kernel combining Concat and Conv2d.

Reproduction of MobileNet V3 architecture as described in [Searching for MobileNetV3](https://arxiv.org/abs/1905.02244) by Andrew Howard, Mark Sandler, Grace Chu, Liang-Chieh Chen, Bo Chen, Mingxing Tan, Weijun Wang, Yukun Zhu, Ruoming Pang, Vijay Vasudevan, Quoc V. Le, Hartwig …
